# Business Requirements Checklist

## Section A — Problem & Outcome

- [x] **Problem statement** — Build a small login + account-setup feature as a worked example so the Codiste team can exercise the full AI-DLC v0.1 workflow end-to-end and produce a reusable reference implementation for client engagements. *(sources/source-001-text.md ¶1; followup Q4=C)*
- [x] **Target users / personas** — Internal Codiste teammates only (sandbox; never exposed to external customers). *(followup Q1=A)*
- [x] **Success metrics** — Workflow milestone: AI-DLC v0.1 completes end-to-end (all 5 Gates signed, Manual QA all-PASS, /grill-me-{1,2} pass). Process is the metric, not product KPI. *(followup Q2=A)*
- [x] **Out-of-scope items** — v1 explicitly excludes: password reset, OAuth/social login, MFA, real email verification (stubs only), profile/avatar upload, admin/user-management dashboard, account deletion. *(followup Q3=A,B,C,D,E,F,G)*
- [x] **Business goals** — Team enablement / training (internal worked example) PLUS reference implementation reusable on real client engagements. *(followup Q4=C)*

## Section B — Constraints & Context

- [x] **Target platforms** — Web only (responsive — desktop + mobile browser); Figma design is a web layout. *(followup Q5=A)*
- [x] **Expected scale** — ≤ 50 internal users total; sporadic use; effectively zero QPS. *(followup Q6=A)*
- [~] N/A: **Budget range** — N/A for an internal learning experiment. No third-party paid services beyond what Codiste already has access to. (Re-open if scope expands during Workflow Planning.)
- [x] **Timeline** — No hard deadline. Finish when AI-DLC walks the team cleanly to Gate #5. *(followup Q7=A)*
- [x] **Stakeholders** — Pod = Tech Lead Chintan (chintanp@codiste.com), Dev Varshil (varshil.g@codiste.in); workflow invoker = Harsh Nebhvani (harsh.nebhvani@codiste.com). No external stakeholders. *(pod.md)*
- [x] **Regulatory / compliance** — None. Internal experiment, no real PII collection beyond email + Argon2id-hashed password. *(followup Q8=A)*
- [x] **External integrations** — None. Email "verification" stubs log to console; everything else is in-process. *(followup Q9=A)*
- [x] **Data classification** — PII at Level Low: email + display name + Argon2id-hashed password only. No card data, no health data, no government IDs. **(Q10 was left blank in followup file; AI inferred A as the only logically-consistent answer given Q3 excludes account deletion + email verification, Q8=A no regulatory regime, Q9=A no external integrations, and Q14=A Argon2id+RS256. Inference flagged in audit.md — pod may override at Gate #1 signoff.)** *(inferred from Q3/Q8/Q9/Q14)*
- [x] **Launch markets / locales** — English only (en-US copy); no i18n framework in v1 (architecture must not preclude adding it later). *(followup Q11=A)*
- [~] N/A: **Monetization model** — N/A for an internal learning experiment.

## Section C — AI-product specifics (Codiste preset)

- [x] **AI/ML usage scope** — None. Login + account-setup is a non-AI flow; no LLM / RAG / classifier in v1. *(followup Q12=A)*
- [x] **Data retention policy** — Account record retained while account is active; auth logs 90 days (Codiste preset default); never trained on user data. *(followup Q13=A; aidlc-profile.md operations.observability.log_retention)*
- [x] **Brand assets availability** — Figma design supplied by team lead at https://www.figma.com/design/He1Wne35awqY445vBFXIhI/AI-DLC. Stage 2 — Design Intake will extract brand tokens, colors, typography, logo references via Figma MCP. *(sources/source-001-text.md)*
- [x] **Existing IP / OSS dependencies** — Use battle-tested OSS: Argon2id (`argon2` lib) for password hashing; jose / jsonwebtoken for JWT (RS256 per Codiste preset); zod / class-validator for input validation. No custom crypto. *(followup Q14=A; aidlc-profile.md conventions)*
- [x] **Accessibility commitment** — WCAG 2.2 AA. Opt-IN to the `accessibility` extension at Stage 4 (Requirements Analysis). *(followup Q15=A)*
- [x] **Legal review status** — Deferred. Internal experiment; no public Privacy Policy / ToS in v1; placeholders only. *(followup Q16=A)*
